data.body: When Foolery knows a beat state may have changed during take-loop progress or session lifecycle, invalidate the active Setlist-related beat queries immediately instead of waiting for session exit or window refocus. Investigate the session/iteration hooks, implement a shared invalidation path for known state-change moments, and add focused validation for the touched behavior. Do not move the knot to a terminal state without explicit user instruction.
data.title: Invalidate setlist on known beat state changes
